item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that’s gonna go out , but I still like it
m-80 ?
now I also want this
as is tradition
i'm proud of it
til tennis balls are indestructible
always go with octopus
jiminy
looks like a canadian rock
i guess
is that a threat?
mmm hmm
great song/band
sorry about this one gang
must be nice to have a permanent excuse
legends
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Bottom shelf memes that might get you in treble.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@JackalopeElope
We are just ONE DAY AWAY from our ONE YEAR anniversary!! It feels like it was just last week..and also 6 years ago. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Smiley Hiley tax.

item.dc:creator: shawns11385772

item.title: Weird Al Yankovic just dropped a new animated music video, "Polkamania!"
item.description:
Weird Al's newest single is a polka medley parodying hit songs of the last 10 years. The animators included: Ghostbot / Alan Lau, Roque Ballesteros, and Roman Laney – “Flowers” Jack D. Evans – “We Don’t Talk About Bruno” Vivienne Medrano/Spindlehorse – “Vampire” Liam Lynch – “Old Town Road” Jarrett Heather – “Despacito” & “WAP” Bill Plympton – “Shape of You” Ryan Krzak – “Uptown Funk” KukoMitzu – “Thank U, Next” Victor Yerrid & Melanie Mandl – “Shake It Off (pt. 1)”
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y0ZoX4dBvwk
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: A legendary of action cinema has passed
item.description:
Cheng Pei Pei was an icon of Hong Kong Cinema and had many roles, but her most influential was probably that of Golden Sparrow from the Wuxia Classic "Come Drink with Me"
Like a lot of Western millieninal Wuxia/Kung Fu Enthusiasts, my introduction to her was as the character Jade Fox from Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon
item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

item.title: Working on walking with my cane. Really happy with my progress.
item.description: I have been working on walking with my cane for about 6 months. I'd like to get to the point where I stop using my walker around the house. My main goal is still to walk without any assistance. Really proud of my progress so far.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: IT'S NOT THE CANCER!!!!
item.description: I'll be on iron, B-12, and folic acid supplements for the rest of my life, but at least it is not the Cancer coming back. Raise a toast for me and go get a colonoscopy people!

item.title: Mais Bien Sûr...
item.description: Merci beaucoup Imgurian! But I believe it is you that is font (pardon the expression) of entertainment! None the less, thank you for the Accolade. May your hands forever be clean no matter what.....✨ Ah Imgurian, 'Une main lave l'autre, non?' That is the saying, yes? We all benefit when we cooperate! So please accept my sincere thanks for the most excellent Accolade, and may you always maintain a clean fresh scent!✨

item.title: Karen’s everywhere
item.dc:creator: ElijahKane

item.title: You look like you need an uplifting dump, I got you (Saturday Wholesome Dump of Positivity)
item.description:
1. Their mischievous faces when they tricked the parents
2. He knew she couldn’t, so he did it for her ?
3. Truly are
4. Usually not the best of timings, but the bride was cool with it
5. Maybe not as wholesome as other videos, but so satisfying
6. The gang gets shot
7. Dragon kites
8. If this video doesn't get you in good mood nothing will (Sound ON)
9. Anti-poachers take selfie with gorillas they are protecting
10. Men in Love
11. Cookie lady eats a cookie
12. Now that's a smooth transition
13. She nailed it actually
14. Further proof that cats are liquid
15. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working on games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I built a low-poly Sephiroth cosplay. It's my first attempt at making a costume out of EVA foam!
item.description:
Masamune sword was 3D printed and painted, the rest was cut out of EVA foam. Total build time was about 6 months during my spare time after work.
Instagram Credit: Low Poly Sephiroth: @mepirate001 Aerith: @closer.kae Photo: @alive_alf

item.title: 55 years ago today humans first landed and stepped on the moon. Carl Sagan’s reflections on that momentous event still resonate to current events today…
item.dc:creator: MustHailSagan

item.title: So I've been realistic this time around
item.description: Almost a year ago I left a really difficult scenario which took a lot of my time, even though it was great for professional growth. In turn I was eating horribly and drinking more than I should. I didnt have time to cook so I ate a lot out (usually wawa and quick check) and drank to unwind because I was physically/mentally/emotionally exhausted. Now I'm balancing with some meds for my adhd, quit drinking alcohol pretty much entirely (there's a ton of great NA options now) and meal prepping more regularly. I look for healthier options, but not ruled by calorie counting like before when I had lost weight the FIRST time. I will always flip flop a little with my weight due to binging from adhd (that's just me). I am back in the gym even though it isn't consistent....yet. I am just happier to be healthier for me. I was so uncomfortable (and still am). But made a lot of progress. I told myself when I did the before photos I wouldn't suck in or flex or try to hide how bad I really felt. Same with the photos today. I am not 100% where I want to be yet but SO HAPPY I am not where I was a year ago. I'm over 30lbs down but my focus is mostly strength training and being healthy. :). Also I don't have those leggings anymore otherwise I'd have created this exactly the same. I am super vulnerable posting this so please be nice or just scroll along. I just wanted to share my growth. This next year will be focus on creative growth because honestly it's been utter trash. It's been such a hard year and mentally has been a lot so really want to focus on catching up on projects and focus on the quality of my work versus just pushing stuff for content/sales.
item.dc:creator: felosoraptor
